name: SHL Assessment Copilot API
description: A RAG-powered assistant that recommends SHL Individual Test Solutions via conversational AI. Uses Qdrant vector search for retrieval, Groq (LLaMA-3.3-70B) for generation, and streams responses over Server-Sent Events (SSE).

GET /health.description: Liveness probe. Returns HTTP 200 when the server is up.

POST /chat.description: Accepts a conversation turn and streams the assistant reply as Server-Sent Events. Internally: classifies intent → vector-searches Qdrant → builds a grounded prompt → streams the LLM reply → emits structured recommendation data → persists to MongoDB.

conversationId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of an existing conversation. Omit (or send null) to start a new one.

messages.description: Full message history sent to the LLM for context. The last element must be the current user message.

example.content: Recommend assessments for a senior Java developer

model.description: Groq model identifier to use for generation.

sseEventStream.description: Each SSE message is a JSON object prefixed with "data: ". The stream ends with "data: [DONE]".

status.description: Pipeline progress updates emitted at each processing stage.

statusValues.done: All processing complete. Stream is about to close.

intent.description: Resolved intent label for the current turn.

intentValues.clarify: Request is too vague — assistant will ask a follow-up question.
intentValues.compare: User wants a side-by-side comparison of specific assessments.
intentValues.refine: User is narrowing or adjusting a previous shortlist.
intentValues.off_topic: Request is unrelated to SHL assessments.

retrieved_count.description: Number of assessments returned from the vector search.

text.description: Streamed LLM token fragment. Concatenate all content values to reconstruct the full reply.

recommendations.description: Structured recommendation payload emitted once after the full text stream. Contains the raw Qdrant results used to ground the reply.

conversationId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the conversation (new or existing). Persist this to resume the thread.

end_of_conversation.description: True when the intent is "off_topic" — the frontend may use this to show a session-end indicator.

error.description: Emitted on unhandled server errors. Stream ends immediately after.

SHLAssessment.name: string   // assessment display name
SHLAssessment.adaptive_irt: boolean  // uses adaptive Item Response Theory
SHLAssessment.test_types: any[]    // raw test-type objects from catalog
SHLAssessment.test_type_codes: string   // comma-separated short codes, e.g. "A, B, K"
SHLAssessment.description: string   // full assessment description used in vector index

GET /conversations.description: Lists all conversations, sorted by most recently updated.

GET /conversations/:id.description: Fetches a single conversation by its MongoDB ObjectId.

shape.title: string
shape.memorySummary: string   // JSON: { role, seniority, technical_skills, behavioral_requirements, personality_requirements, preferences, constraints }

GET /conversations/:id/messages.description: Returns all messages for a conversation, sorted oldest-first.

shape.recommendations: SHLAssessment[]   // populated only on assistant messages that returned results
shape.model: string | undefined   // Groq model used for this reply

DELETE /conversations/:id.description: Deletes a conversation and all its associated messages.
